$comment: DMM / FANZA title aliases. Keys are `<type>|<gt_title>`. When present, the parser uses alias.series + alias.type for lookup instead of the GT title.

EB|融点 [完全版](巻).series: 融点〜とけあい〜[完全版]【特装版】
EB|融点 [完全版](巻).note: GT records bound-volume (EB) with a shortened display name; raw rows use the full series name with 【特装版】 suffix.

rules: For any GT title ending with 【分冊版】, the parser also tries the title with 【分冊版】 stripped (recorder sometimes appends it to WT/EP rows).
For any GT title not ending with 【分冊版】, the parser also tries the title with 【分冊版】 appended (recorder sometimes omits it on EP rows).
♥ is stripped from titles before matching (e.g. 我が家のヒモ男♥【分冊版】 → 我が家のヒモ男【分冊版】).
Fullwidth tilde ～ (U+FF5E) is unified with wave dash 〜 (U+301C) before matching.
Fullwidth brackets ［ ］ are converted to ASCII [ ].
All spaces (both ASCII and ideographic) and ♥ are stripped in the canonical key.
